mnemonics.title: Map Implementations
mnemonics.content: H-T-L (HashMap-TreeMap-LinkedHashMap): H for Hash (fast), T for Tree (sorted), L for Linked (ordered)

mnemonics.title: Comparator Return Values
mnemonics.content: N-Z-P (Negative-Zero-Positive): Negative when first < second, Zero when equal, Positive when first > second

mnemonics.title: Map Collection Views
mnemonics.content: K-V-E (Keys-Values-Entries): keySet() for keys, values() for values, entrySet() for entries
